description: The singleton project style spec (lenient; the style compiler normalises).

additionalProperties.description: Authored visual style for one edge category (lenient; the style compiler normalises).

connections.description: Per-category edge visual style, keyed by category name. Absent categories use code defaults.

additionalProperties.description: Authored visual style for one element kind (lenient; the style compiler normalises).

icon.description: Icon name rendered on the node, e.g. "user", "database".

variant.description: Optional visual variant. Known values: "external" (external-system styling).

elements.description: Per-element-kind visual style, keyed by kind name. Absent kinds use code defaults.

source.description: Freeform provenance note: how or where this artifact was sourced from.

dark.description: Surface colors for the dark theme.

ink.description: Text/ink color used on the surface.

surface.description: Node surface color for this theme.

light.description: Surface colors for the light theme.

ink.description: Text/ink color used on the surface.

surface.description: Node surface color for this theme.

type.description: Artifact kind label: "style" (v2). Legacy files used "spec" — still accepted; the compiler upgrades.

version.description: Style spec format version. Current is 2.

title: WorkSpec C4 Style Spec (v1alpha1)
